description:
Replace Fira Code with FiraCode Nerd Font for built-in Nerd Font glyphs,
which benefits the nerd-icons usage in org-agenda and vertico +icons.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (UI tweaks section, line ~308)

Change font-spec family from "Fira Code" to "FiraCode Nerd Font"
title: Switch font to FiraCode Nerd Font
